name_en: Shogun Jizo and its Miniature Shrine
description_en: A Shogun Jizo statue and its miniature shrine (zushi), classified as a structure and craft item under tangible cultural properties. Municipally designated by Numata City, Gunma Prefecture, on 1977-05-30.

description_en: A painting of the Five Great Wisdom Kings (Godaison), classified as painting under tangible cultural properties. Municipally designated by Numata City, Gunma Prefecture, on 1977-05-30.

name_en: Excavated Artifacts from the Nara Burial Mound Group
description_en: Artifacts excavated from the Nara burial mound group, classified as archaeological material under tangible cultural properties. Municipally designated by Numata City, Gunma Prefecture, on 1977-05-30.
